headline: Magna International Inc (MGA) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Earnings Growth Amid ...
summary: Magna International Inc (MGA) reports robust financial performance with significant increases in adjusted EBIT and EPS, despite facing global production declines and market uncertainties.
